title: Middle Eastern Fig Salad
description: A refreshing and flavorful salad featuring sweet caramelized figs and crunchy greens. This salad is perfect for a light and healthy meal or as a side dish for your favorite Middle Eastern recipes.
instructions: 2. Cut the figs in half and place them on a baking sheet. Drizzle with a little bit of olive oil and sprinkle with salt. Roast in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until caramelized.
3. In a large bowl, combine the mixed greens, roasted figs, pomegranate molasses, and lemon juice. Toss to combine.
4. Drizzle the salad with olive oil and sprinkle with crushed red pepper to taste.
